title: niphobolus polydactylos
intro: Niphobolus polydactylos, also known as Maidenhair Fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Niphobolus polydactylos include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis.
